steps.title: Inspect Expensive Flow Summary
steps.prompt: Inspect the latest expensive-flow summary and identify whether dominant_flow_kind and operator_next_priority still explain the current operator bottleneck. Focus on wrong_next_step, reroute_loop, output_bloat, and over_stage_entry ordering.

steps.title: Verify Operator Priority Explanation
steps.prompt: Validate whether operator_next_priority, output_bloat_followup_needed, and operator_validation_status remain consistent with the observed flow mix. If wrong_next_step is not dominant, confirm that output_bloat follow-up does not preempt it.
